name: Professor Ciaran Driver
title: Professor of Economics
expertise_topics: Ciaran Driver (Professor of Economics in the School of Finance and Management) pursues research on capital investment
and economic policy. Current projects include a study of UK dividend behaviour
and stakeholding theory. He co-authored with Paul Temple The Unbalanced Economy
Palgrave-Macmillan (2014) and co-edited with Grahame Thompson Corporate Governance in Contention
research_interests: Ciaran Driver (Professor of Economics in the School of Finance and Management) pursues research on capital investment; innovation; corporate governance; and economic policy. Current projects include a study of UK dividend behaviour; South African business survey forecasts; UK capital investment constraints; and stakeholding theory. He co-authored with Paul Temple The Unbalanced Economy; Palgrave-Macmillan (2014) and co-edited with Grahame Thompson Corporate Governance in Contention; Oxford Univ
